releases.label: DR4
releases.summary: Scheduled 2 Dec 2026: ~2.8B sources from 66 months of data; full epoch astrometry, photometry, RVs and BP/RP+RVS spectra; ~500 TB.

releases.label: FPR
releases.summary: Focused Product Release: omega Cen crowded-field astrometry/photometry, QSO gravitational-lens candidates, extended diffuse-interstellar-band maps, SSO epoch astrometry.

releases.label: DR3
releases.summary: Full DR3: 1.81B sources; astrophysical parameters for ~470M, low-res BP/RP spectra for ~220M, RVs for ~33M, non-single-star and variability catalogs.

releases.label: EDR3
releases.summary: Improved 5-parameter astrometry and G/BP/RP photometry for 1.8B sources (34 months of data).

releases.label: DR2
releases.summary: Five-parameter astrometry for 1.3B sources, RVs for 7.2M stars; enabled the HR-diagram and Milky Way kinematics revolution.

releases.label: DR1
releases.summary: First release: positions/G mags for 1.1B sources; TGAS parallaxes and proper motions for 2M Tycho-2 stars.
